description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named VCPKG Continuous Integration that runs on push to master, on pull requests, and daily. The workflow has three jobs: build_linux, build_mac, and release jobs that depend on the build jobs. build_linux and build_mac build and test on multiple ubuntu and macOS environments with different LLVM versions, and upload artifacts. The release jobs download artifacts, create a draft release, and upload assets to it when a tag is pushed.
